text: Hello? Hello. Hey, this is Chelsea. There's a note on your Medicare profile that your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed. Just a quick confirmation from you and we're all set. Do you have Part A and Part B? Yes, I do, but I also charge care for wife and that disqualifies me, so don't bother me.
